ticker.text: KCSE 2025 Results: Outstanding performance — Congratulations to our Form 4 class!
Now offering both 844 & CBC curricula — conforming to Kenya's current education system
Environmental Club Tree Planting Drive — 500 trees planted on school grounds this term!
Form 1 & Grade 10 Admissions for 2027 are NOW OPEN — Apply at the school office

news.title: 500 Trees Planted — Moi Barracks Leads County Environmental Drive
news.excerpt: In a remarkable display of environmental stewardship, learners and staff came together to plant 500 trees across the school and surrounding community.

news.title: School Successfully Launches CBC Senior Secondary — Grade 10 Class Inducted
news.excerpt: Moi Barracks Senior School officially inducted its first Grade 10 CBC class, marking a milestone in Kenya's education reform.

news.title: KCSE 2025: Outstanding Results — Learners Achieve Excellent Grades
news.excerpt: Our Form 4 class posted impressive KCSE results, with multiple learners qualifying for university placements.

news.title: Form 1 & Grade 10 Admissions for 2027 Now Open
news.excerpt: Applications for both the 844 and CBC pathways for the 2027 academic year are now being accepted at the school office.
